sqlMap.select: select type_id, used from tbl_journal_form_type where tenant_id=#tenantId# and company_id=#companyId#
sqlMap.insert: insert into tbl_journal_form_type (type_id, used, company_id, tenant_id) values (#typeId#, 'use', #companyId#, #tenantId#)
sqlMap.update: update tbl_journal_form_type set used=#used# where type_id = #typeId# and company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.insert: insert into tbl_journal_auth (user_id, dept_id, tenant_id) values (#userId#, #deptId#, #tenantId#)
sqlMap.select: select form_id, form_name, form_info, form_date, form_writer, form_status from tbl_journal_form where type_id = #typeId# and company_id = #companyId# and tenant_id = #tenantId# order by form_id asc
select a.DISPLAYNAME from tbl_deptmaster a join tbl_journal_form_user_dept b on a.CN = b.dept_id where b.form_id = #formId#
select a.form_id, a.form_name from tbl_journal_form a join tbl_journal_form_user_dept b on a.form_id = b.form_id where b.dept_id = #deptId# and a.type_id = #typeId# and a.tenant_id = #tenantId#

select distinct a.form_id, a.form_name from tbl_journal_form a join tbl_journal_form_type b on a.company_id = b.company_id where b.used = 'use' and a.form_status = 'basic' and a.tenant_id = #tenantId#
